channel.title: The Grant Desk - AI & Safety, Remote, added in last 30 days
channel.description: Paid open calls, fellowships and residencies in AI, tech, research, and digital and mixed-media arts, sorted into the right pile. Updated as new calls land on the desk. Filtered to: AI & Safety, Remote, added in last 30 days.

item.title: Humans in Control: Distributed Organizing Manager (Remote)
item.description:
Organisation: Humans in Control

Location: Remote (United States; US work authorization required)

Award: USD 65,000 to 80,000 per year, plus benefits (medical, dental, vision, PTO, 401(k)). No application fee.

Duration: Full-time

Deadline: Rolling / undated

Humans in Control empowers the public to shape AI policy through grassroots organizing and bipartisan advocacy for commonsense safeguards that protect children and families. The Distributed Organizing Manager builds and supports distributed/volunteer organizing to advance the organization's advocacy goals. This is a full-time, fully remote role open to candidates anywhere in the United States (US work authorization required). Compensation is USD 65,000-80,000 plus benefits. Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis (no fixed deadline). See the listing for full responsibilities and to apply.

Open call details

Want to see more grants? Visit The Grant Desk (https://www.artificialnouveau.com/smalltools/grants/).
